task_description: find all Markdown files, extract code fences, determine the most common programming language used, and save the statistics to JSON
code:
echo "Counting occurrences of each programming language..."
sort code_fences.txt | uniq -c | sort -nr > language_counts.txt
cat language_counts.txt

return code: 0

```bash
echo "Extracting code fences from Markdown files..."
for file in $(find . -type f -name "*.md"); do
    echo "Processing $file"
    grep -oP '(?<=```)[^`]+(?=```)' "$file" | while read -r lang; do
        echo "$lang"
    done
done > code_fences.txt
```
